sova.title: B-Site Main Entry Recon
sova.description: Scans deep B Main lane, ultimate orb, and shed entry from B lobby.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in B-Lobby corner against the wooden box crates.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the intersection of the crane rope and the sky dome outline.

sova.title: A-Site Default Plant Shock Dart
sova.description: Lands on default generator plant spot from A Garden lobby.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in A Garden against the green wooden crate barrel.
steps.aim_desc: Align Sova's double-shock diamond UI tip with the corner of the brick chimney.

viper.title: A-Site Default Snakebite
viper.description: Lands on default generator plant to deny defuse from A Main.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in A Main against the vertical brick column near the entry choke.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the bottom-right corner of the hanging metal banner roof ornament.

killjoy.title: B-Site Default Plant Nanoswarm
killjoy.description: Lands on default lane box plant spot from B Link hallway.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in B Link in front of the grey metal server console.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the second row bolt on the ceiling air vent duct.

sova.title: A-Site Default Recon Bolt
sova.description: Scans default plant, A-bath entry, and truck from A-lobby.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in A-Lobby against the second metal pipe barrel.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the corner of the solar panel, align Sova's charge bar UI line with the leaf below.

brimstone.title: B-Site Default Plant Incendiary
brimstone.description: Burns the default back-site container plant zone from B Long fountain.

steps.stand_desc: Stand at B Long fountain, tuck into the corner of the brick flowerbed.
steps.aim_desc: Align the bottom-left tip of Brimstone's moly hud icon with the third leaf branch on the tree.

gekko.title: A-Site Truck Mosh Pit
gekko.description: Covers A site truck cubby to deny plants or force defenders out.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in A Bath shower entry lobby against the green metal fence post.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the top-left corner of the orange billboard banner.

sova.title: C-Site Back Site Recon Bolt
sova.description: Scans deep C long entry, C garage door, and back-site platform from C lobby.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in C Lobby corner in front of the green garden fence.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the top of the tall pagoda tower roof spire, 2 bars charge.

viper.title: B-Site Default Plant Snakebite
viper.description: Denies default plant inside B center box from Mid window choke.

steps.stand_desc: Stand inside Mid Window room, line up against the left side of the frame.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the top edge of the dragon banner ornament hanging on B site facade.

viper.title: A-Site Screens Poison Cloud
viper.description: One-way smoke covering A main screens push to block attackers vision.

steps.stand_desc: Stand on A site rafters ramp, align with the center wall stripe.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the white horizontal panel line on the screens pillar.

sova.title: A-Site Pyramids Recon Bolt
sova.description: Scans back pyramids, yellow container, and site entries from A shop lobby.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in A Shop lobby corner next to the metallic barrels.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the top apex of the mountain peak visible in the clouds background.

gekko.title: B-Site Default Plant Mosh Pit
gekko.description: Denies defuse on default B pillar plant spot from B Main lobby.

steps.stand_desc: Stand in B Main lobby next to the blue double door dumpster.
steps.aim_desc: Aim at the wire node intersection on the building telephone pole.
